title: Can't list tags when repository has LOTs of tags
body:
When trying to list tags of a repository that includes **many** tags (I tried with calico/node), you get randomly the following error:
```
$ skopeo --override-arch amd64 list-tags docker://docker.io/calico/node 
FATA[0031] Error listing repository tags: http: unexpected EOF reading trailer
```

comments.body: not sure if some changes have been made since but I no longer hit that issue (at least with the calico repo). I guess we can close it
Thanks for the update. Pagination has been in use since https://github.com/containers/image/pull/441 , and I can’t think of any recent change that should have made a difference.
